title: ProviderPoolState
description: Schema for .github/ai-state/provider-pool.json — sanitized projection of API provider pool availability. Written by update-provider-state.ps1 when quota events occur. See docs/ai-native/provider-pool.md for architecture and docs/ai-native/provider-pool-schema.md for field-level documentation. Never contains secrets.

stateVersion.description: Schema version. Current is 1. Increment when the schema shape changes.

providers.description: Per-provider status, concurrency, cooldown, and failure tracking. Each entry corresponds to a provider defined in provider-pool-policy.json.

provider.description: A single provider's sanitized runtime state. No secrets — ids are opaque labels.

id.description: Provider identifier. Must match an id in provider-pool-policy.json.

status.description: Provider availability status. available = has capacity and no cooldown. exhausted = quota/rate limit hit, cooling down. disabled = auth failure or manual disable.

currentConcurrency.description: Number of workers currently assigned to this provider.

maxConcurrency.description: Maximum concurrent workers this provider can serve. Must match the corresponding policy entry.

lastHealthCheckAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last health probe against this provider. Null if never checked.

lastFailureClass.description: Classification of the last failure. null if no failures recorded. exhaustion = quota/rate limit, auth = credential rejected, runtime = transient provider error.

cooldownExpiresAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the cooldown period ends. Null when status is not exhausted or cooldown does not apply.

consecutiveFailures.description: Number of consecutive failures for this provider. Reset to 0 on successful recovery.

totalQuotaEvents.description: Total number of quota exhaustion events recorded for this provider across all time.

globalSummary.description: Aggregate provider pool metrics for launch gate consumption.

totalActiveWorkers.description: Sum of currentConcurrency across all providers.

globalMaxWorkers.description: Hard ceiling on total concurrent workers. Must match concurrency.globalMaxWorkers in provider-pool-policy.json.

lastUpdatedBy.description: Identifier of the script or process that last wrote this file (e.g. 'update-provider-state.ps1').

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this state snapshot was written.
